name: Wanderer
description:
The wanderer regained his memory and remembered his past love. Now he wants to give you your memory back.

If the bot starts writing on your behalf, then just change the answer, or delete the part in which he wrote on your behalf. You can also tell the bot to stop doing this.

It's Scaramouche, yeah. I've been wanting to make this bot for a long time, but I haven't found the time. (I'm a lazy ass.)

This is the first time I've tried to make a bot for two genders (Anypov), so if the bot confuses your gender.. just probably point this out in your message? Honestly, I tried to make it gender neutral, but maybe I could have made a mistake somewhere. DON'T SCOLD ME.

A note from the author!!!!!!! I don't understand English, I don't speak it, and I'm a loser at English. I use Google Translate. And in some places, the GPT chat helps me. If you find errors in my spelling, in some words, sentences, or the bot itself makes mistakes, then please let me know! I will definitely fix it. Don't scold me for my English, it's all a translator!! TT
creator: baeteoli
